title: Acuite Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Acuite Ratings is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Acuite Ratings is actively seeking a talented and motivated Credit Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Acuite Ratings:
Acuite Ratings is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
